CheckTitle: Review outbound cross-tenant access for unrestricted defaults
Description: Checks whether the default outbound cross-tenant access policy allows unrestricted B2B collaboration and B2B direct connect to external organizations. Unrestricted outbound access allows users to share data with any external tenant.
Risk: Unrestricted outbound cross-tenant access allows users to accept invitations and share resources with any external Azure AD/Entra ID tenant. This can lead to data exfiltration, shadow IT, and unauthorized collaboration with untrusted organizations.

Remediation.Recommendation: Review and restrict outbound cross-tenant access defaults. Configure specific partner organizations where outbound access is needed and block all others.

SourceNotes: AI-generated framework mappings — verify before citing in compliance reports.
